title: SessionManager
content:
# SessionManager


## Methods


### __init__() -> None


### reset_session(full_reset: bool, ignore_destructive_warning: bool) -> OperationResponse

Logs off the client all currently stored sessions.


### reset_session_tokens(url: Optional[str]) -> None

Reset stored tokens for the specified url.


### logout_from_url(url: Optional[str]) -> None

Logout from the specified url.


### full_reset(ignore_destructive_warning: bool) -> OperationResponse

Reset all configurations & cache used by Kelvin SDK.


### browser_login(url: str) -> OperationResponse


### login_with_stored_credentials(url: str) -> bool

Logs the user into the provided url using stored credentials.


### login_on_url(url: str, username: Optional[str], password: Optional[str], totp: Optional[str], client_id: Optional[str], client_secret: Optional[str], reset: bool) -> OperationResponse

Logs the user into the provided url.


### login_client_on_current_url(verbose: bool) -> Client

Login process


### check_token_expiration(url: str, tokens: TokenCredentials) -> TokenCredentials

Check if the token is expired and refresh if needed.


### authentication_token(full: bool, margin: float) -> OperationResponse

Obtain an authentication authentication_token from the API.


### get_global_ksdk_configuration() -> KelvinSDKGlobalConfiguration

Attempt to retrieve the KelvinSDKGlobalConfiguration from specified file path.


### get_documentation_link_for_current_url() -> Optional[str]

Retrieve, if existent, the complete url to the documentation page.


### get_kelvin_system_information_for_display() -> str

Display system information as well as, if existent, the current session's url.


### get_kelvin_system_information() -> dict

Report the entire configuration set currently in use by Kelvin SDK.


### get_docker_current_url() -> str


### get_current_session_metadata() -> CompanyMetadata

Returns the current session company metadata


### refresh_metadata(url: str) -> SyncMetadata

Refresh metadata on request.


### setup_logger(verbose: bool, colored_logs: bool) -> Any

Sets up the logger based on the verbose flag.


### global_configuration_list(should_display: bool) -> OperationResponse

List all available configurations for the Kelvin-SDK


### global_configuration_set(configuration: str, value: str) -> OperationResponse

Set the specified configuration on the platform system.


### global_configuration_unset(configuration: str) -> OperationResponse

Unset the specified configuration from the platform system
